name: python3-sqlalchemy-ext

summary: SQL toolkit and Object Relational Mapper for Python3 - C extension
description:
SQL toolkit and Object Relational Mapper for Python3 - C extension
SQLAlchemy is an SQL database abstraction library for Python.
.
This package contains C coded extension accelerator for SQLAlchemy.

When validating lab setup, run `python3-sqlalchemy-ext --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
